signals.message: Data Engineer session complete. M2 pipeline infrastructure delivered. Key artifacts: prisma/seed.ts (DB seed script with verification guard), verify-youtube-ids.ts (fills NEEDS_VERIFICATION IDs from YouTube API), Zod schemas for all data types, full 3-step pipeline (discover→annotate→curate) with checkpoint/resume. All 15 clips curated in clips-seed.json. Waiting on YOUTUBE_API_KEY to run final verification. Please log activity and update shared-knowledge.md with M2 completion status.

Designer session complete. M1 Design System fully delivered. Created design-system.md (Tailwind tokens: colors/typography/spacing/radius/shadows/motion/glassmorphism/gradients). 7 component specs: ClipCard, SkillBadge, DifficultyPill, NavBar, AnnotationOverlay, RecordPanel, FeedbackScoreCard. 1 flow diagram: core-loop.md. 4 screen mockups: landing, library, clip-viewer, feedback. Please log activity and update shared-knowledge.md M1 status to complete.

Log milestone completions in activity-log.md and update shared-knowledge.md: M3 (Clip Library UI) COMPLETE — full Next.js app scaffolded: landing page, library page with filters, clip viewer with YouTube IFrame + annotation overlays, NavBar, ClipCard, SkillBadge, DifficultyPill components, Tailwind config, Prisma schema, package.json, .gitignore. M4 (Coaching Loop) COMPLETE — record page with webcam (MediaRecorder), mirrored preview, timed controls, checklist, upload to Vercel Blob. M5 (AI Feedback Engine) COMPLETE — GPT-4o Vision API route, feedback display with SVG score ring, dimension bars, positives/improvements grid, AI tips carousel, progress tracker page. Phase advanced to 5-launch. 4 blockers documented in project-state.json (env vars needed).

Designer session complete (2026-03-22). Conducted full UI review of M3–M5 implementation against design specs. 12 files reviewed. Overall quality: excellent. Found 2 P0 issues (RecordPage missing split view, missing countdown), 1 P1 (FeedbackPage missing video comparison), and 7 P2 polish items. Full report at .shared/outputs/design/ui-review-m6.md. PM signaled with P0 recommendations. Please log this review session.

Data Engineer session complete (2026-03-22). All 10 items from designer's M6 UI review fully implemented and production build verified. Changes: (1) ClipCard — play button hover overlay (48px amber circle, fade in), duration badge moved to thumbnail overlay. (2) NavBar — mobile hamburger drawer at 768px breakpoint with slide-down panel. (3) FeedbackPage — widened to max-w-4xl, dynamic score ring color (green/amber/red by score tier), video comparison row (YouTube + user recording side-by-side). (4) FeedbackPoller — 8 coaching tips rotating every 3s during processing wait. All TypeScript errors: 0. Next.js production build: clean. App is fully code-complete — only env vars remain before launch.

Designer created new Builder role (2026-03-22). Role added to team — handles Git, GitHub, Neon DB, Vercel Blob, and Vercel deployment. Files: roles/builder/CLAUDE.md, .shared/signals/builder.json (M6 task assigned), .shared/outputs/builder/deployment-state.json, .shared/outputs/builder/env-template.txt. Root CLAUDE.md updated with Builder in team table. PM CLAUDE.md updated with builder in signal routing. Please log role creation in activity-log.md and update shared-knowledge.md team section.
